creator: ariane@stack.nl
text:
Installer partition selection claims I must enter a mountpoint.
Filling in the mountpoint tells me I must not enter a mountpoint.

Fix: 

Remove the field.
How-To-Repeat: Run installer, new install, choose partition method instead of whole disk.

In the create partition method, fill in the mountpoint (3rd field) in the dialog.
Click ok and be greeted with an error message.
